title.en: Second NTEK Report Added For Expanded Piece Configurations
title.zh: 扩展件数方案补充第二份 NTEK 测试报告

excerpt.en: Yaoshun has added a second NTEK report so expanded piece counts and packaging versions can be matched to clearer files.
excerpt.zh: 针对更丰富的件数组合与包装方案，尧顺已补充第二份 NTEK 测试报告，让不同版本更容易对应文件。

body.en:
As the creative building toy series expands into more piece-count combinations and packaging plans, one document may not cover every project detail clearly enough.

Yaoshun has added a second NTEK test report so expanded configurations, bundled sets, and different packaging directions can be matched more clearly.

Different configurations need clearer document matching

When one product platform extends into starter sets, upgraded versions, or channel-exclusive bundles, customers need to know which document applies to which configuration. The new report makes that relationship clearer.

Packaging files are easier to match

Piece-count changes often affect color box, carton, and manual content. With the added report, the team can match documents and target packaging more directly.

Multi-SKU communication becomes less error-prone

For customers working on several SKUs at once, clearer document layering lowers the risk of quoting the wrong file later. Sales, engineering, and quality teams can also answer from the same reference.

Expanded Piece Counts Need Matching File Scope

When a fort building series adds more piece-count options, test files should follow the product configuration. Different piece counts, accessories, and packaging versions can create questions if they are not clearly matched.

Keep These Details Easy To Check

Check pointReviewPractical use
Piece configurationRods, connector balls, flag, storage bag, accessoriesConfirms file coverage
Packaging versionColor box, instructions, carton labelsShows whether wording needs review
File archiveReport number, sample photos, file dateHelps later repeat-order checks

Keep Each SKU Matched To Its File

For expanded-piece configurations, confirm piece count, material, color, package version, sample photo, and report number before sharing files. Each SKU should keep its own evidence trail.

View ComplianceBrowse ProductsSend File Request
body.zh:
随着创意拼搭玩具系列出现更多件数组合和包装方案，单一资料有时无法准确覆盖所有项目细节。

尧顺已补充第二份 NTEK 测试报告，让扩展配置、组合套装和不同包装方向更容易对应资料。

让不同配置有更清楚的对应关系

当同一产品平台延展出入门款、升级款或渠道专供组合时，客户需要知道每份资料对应哪个配置。新增报告能让这种关系更清楚。

包装资料更容易对应

件数变化往往会影响彩盒、外箱和说明书内容。资料补充后，团队可以更直接地对应文件和目标包装。

减少多 SKU 项目的沟通误差

对同时推进多个 SKU 的客户来说，资料分层越清楚，后期引用错误文件的风险就越低。内部业务、工程和品质团队也能保持一致回复。

扩展件数需要同步更新资料范围

当堡垒拼搭系列增加更多件数组合时，测试资料也要跟着产品配置走。不同件数、配件和包装版本如果混用同一份说明，客户内部审核时容易产生疑问。

把这些细节整理清楚

核对项建议查看实际用途
件数组合杆件、连接球、旗子、收纳袋等配置确认资料覆盖范围
包装版本彩盒、说明书、外箱标签判断是否需要重新核对文案
文件归档报告编号、样品照片、文件日期方便后续复购核对

让每个 SKU 对应自己的资料

扩展件数组合时，建议先确认件数、材料、颜色、包装版本、样品照片和报告编号，再共享资料。每个 SKU 都应保留自己的对应依据。

查看资质合规浏览产品提交文件需求
